title: opencode-ntfy.sh Configuration
description: Configuration file for the opencode-ntfy.sh plugin, which sends push notifications via ntfy.sh during OpenCode sessions. Located at ~/.config/opencode/notification-ntfy.json.

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON Schema for editor validation and autocompletion.

enabled.description: Global kill switch for all notifications.

topic.description: The ntfy.sh topic to publish notifications to.

token.description: Bearer token for authentication with the ntfy.sh server.

mode.description: Whether the target device uses light or dark mode. Determines which icon variant is used.

variant.description: Custom icon URL overrides per mode variant.

light.description: Custom icon URL override for light mode. Must point to a JPEG or PNG image.

dark.description: Custom icon URL override for dark mode. Must point to a JPEG or PNG image.

fetchTimeout.description: ISO 8601 duration for the HTTP request timeout when calling the ntfy.sh server (e.g., 'PT10S' for 10 seconds).

title.description: Title configuration per event type. Each key is an event type and the value specifies how to produce the notification title.

message.description: Message configuration per event type. Each key is an event type and the value specifies how to produce the notification message.

enabled.description: Whether this event type triggers notifications.

contentTemplate.description: Content template for a notification field. Must contain exactly one of 'value' or 'command'.

value.description: A template string rendered via renderTemplate. Supports {var_name} placeholders.

command.description: A template string rendered via renderTemplate, then executed as a shell command. The trimmed stdout is used as the value.
